"'''At the Crossroads: The Spacer's Tale'''" is a short story about [[BoShek/Legends|BoShek]] written by [[Jerry Oltion]] for ''[[Tales from the Mos Eisley Cantina]]'', which was published in [[August]] [[1995]] by [[Bantam Spectra]]. It takes place in [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]].

{{Shortstory-stub}}

==Plot summary==
Racing to [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] after breaking the [[Kessel Run/Legends|Kessel Run]] record, [[Spacer/Legends|spacer]] [[BoShek/Legends|BoShek]] briefly meets [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] in the [[Mos Eisley/Legends|Mos Eisley]] [[Cantina/Legends|cantina]]. As a [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]], BoShek is particularly touched by this encounter with a former [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]]. Later, when on the run from [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperials]], BoShek instinctively into the [[The Force/Legends|Force]] to [[Mind trick/Legends|mind-trick]] his pursuers, perhaps guided by the unseen hand of Obi-Wan.
